author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
Lizzie McGuire Takes The Dreaded Aptitude Test! 👀📝 | Lizzie McGuire | @disneychannel
Watch a clip from Lizzie McGuire season 1 episode 6, "Jack of All Trades". What happens when a kid realizes that he can be great at everything? Introducing Jack of All Trades!

Watch the next Lizzie McGuire throwback video here: https://youtu.be/DkP0miHbWAE

Available on Disney+
https://www.disneyplus.com/whats-on/entity-a5525471-bb5a-4367-b7a3-52a69dbfbad8

Watch more Lizzie McGuire videos here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6R6yXKSLYB5LEZ3LS9wy_ob5GCFs9S3

Enter the world of Lizzie McGuire who, together with her best friends Miranda and Gordo, gets into all sorts of misadventures and embarrassing situations as she makes her way through the middle school maze. Every day is a popularity contest, every class is a crisis and on top of everything else, Lizzie has to deal with her annoying little brother Matt, "queen of mean" Kate, and crush Ethan Craft! You always know what Lizzie is thinking, and if she can't quite say it, you can be sure her animated alter ego will.

author: Disney Channel YouTube
text:
Who's up for a game of hide and go stink? 🚮😅| Wizards Beyond Waverly Place | Disney Channel
Wizards Beyond Waverly Place is available on Disney Channel and Disney+!
https://ondisneyplus.disney.com/show/wizards-beyond-waverly-place 

Watch Wizards Beyond Waverly Place on Disney Channel! And check out more Wizards Beyond Waverly Place videos here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6R6yXKSLYDtvFxUeGrzrWQ0nz-bwKMK

"Wizards Beyond Waverly Place" follows an adult Justin Russo, who has chosen to lead a normal, mortal life with his family, Giada, Roman and Milo. When Justin’s sister Alex brings Billie to his home seeking help, Justin realizes he must dust off his magical skills to mentor the wizard-in-training while also juggling his everyday responsibilities — and safeguarding the future of the Wizard World.

Jump in and get to know Disney Channel stars as they just chat through a stream of consciousness, uninterrupted thoughts, feelings and reactions to surprises, hot takes, Q&As, and mini challenges in "Thought Streams".
